description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure wearing a fitted, futuristic outfit with a hood that features cat-like ears. The person has glasses and a visible, angular jawline, with a confident, upright stance and arms extended horizontally. The clothing includes a form-fitting bodysuit with reinforced sections at the knees, elbows, and shoulders, and gloves that cover the hands. The figure also wears high-top athletic shoes and a separate circular accessory, possibly a headband or armband, floating beside them. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a blend of athletic and playful elements. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting synthetic materials.
description: A stylized adult in a fitted, futuristic hooded outfit with cat ears, glasses, and athletic shoes, standing with arms outstretched. The figure is accessorized with a floating circular band.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hood with cat ears, glasses, and the full bodysuit with gloves and shoes; the circular accessory floats to the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, the fitted nature of the suit, and the floating accessory's position behind the figure.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the hood, a graphic on the upper back, and the full length of the bodysuit; the circular accessory is to the left.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the floating accessory behind the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted hooded bodysuit with gloves and high-top athletic shoes, featuring playful and sporty design elements
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length straight hair, partially covered by hood
